headline: This SPX Technologies Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Wednesday

headline: Big investors have been fleeing for-sale housing market, even before Trump ordered ban
summary: President Donald Trump wants to ban big investors from buying single-family rental homes, but investors have already been selling due to high home prices.

raw.headline: Big investors have been fleeing for-sale housing market, even before Trump ordered ban
raw.summary: President Donald Trump wants to ban big investors from buying single-family rental homes, but investors have already been selling due to high home prices.

headline: Weekly mortgage demand surged 11% higher last week, as rates sat near 4-year low
summary: Lower mortgage rates last week caused a run on refinancing and renewed interest from homebuyers, but rates have already moved higher again.

headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On Lennar with Hold Rating, Announces Price Target of $110
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Jonathan Bettenhausen   initiates coverage on Lennar (NYSE:LEN) with a Hold rating and announces Price Target of $110.
